title: Istio WasmPlugin
description: A WasmPlugin provides a mechanism to extend the functionality provided by the Istio proxy through WebAssembly filters. It enables custom authentication, authorization, metrics, logging, and traffic transformation at the proxy level.

matchLabels.description: One or more labels that indicate a specific set of pods/VMs on which the plugin should be applied.

selector.description: Workload selector to apply the plugin to specific workloads.

targetRefs.description: Target references to apply the plugin to specific resources.

url.description: URL of a Wasm module or OCI container image. Supports oci://, http://, https://, and file:// schemes.

sha256.description: SHA256 checksum that will be used to verify the Wasm module or OCI container.

imagePullPolicy.description: The pull behavior to be applied when fetching Wasm module images.

imagePullSecret.description: Credentials to use for OCI image pulling. Name of a Kubernetes Secret.

pluginConfig.description: The configuration that will be passed on to the plugin. Encoded as JSON and passed to the Wasm module.

pluginName.description: The plugin name to be used in the Envoy configuration. Allows distinguishing between multiple uses of the same Wasm module.

phase.description: Determines where in the filter chain this WasmPlugin is to be injected.

priority.description: Determines ordering of WasmPlugins in the same phase. Higher priority is evaluated first.

failStrategy.description: Specifies the failure behavior for the plugin. FAIL_CLOSE rejects traffic, FAIL_OPEN skips the plugin.

valueFrom.description: Source for the environment variable's value.

value.description: Value for the environment variable when valueFrom is INLINE.

env.description: Environment variables to pass to the VM.

mode.description: Criteria for selecting traffic by their direction.

ports.description: Criteria for selecting traffic by port.

match.description: Specifies the criteria to determine which traffic is passed to WasmPlugin.

type.description: Specifies the type of Wasm Extension to be used.
